strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Direct One

strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the pooled champion unchanged. Its parallel falsifying repair panel remains the principal replicated control for answer-generating review.
strategies.name: Efficient Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Replicate the frozen pipeline unchanged. Its pooled regeneration gain of nine additional oracle-covered cases and strongly positive intervention balance remain promising, while another sealed panel will test whether Iteration 21's zero generation gain was panel variance.
strategies.name: Blind Regeneration then Falsifying Integration

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the operationally equivalent nine-bank one-review mechanism as the close allocation and call-efficiency probe. It tests whether spending calls on independent candidate coverage rather than extra reviewers can overcome the selector gap on a fresh panel.
strategies.name: One-Review Nine-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Test a genuinely different selection architecture. Three disjoint committee delegates expose independent support structure to falsifying selectors, while delegate fusion retains one deterministic base-plurality anchor against weak-review reversals.
strategies.name: Committee-Delegate Falsifying Selection with Fusion
